_comment: Claude Desktop config. MERGE the `mcpServers` key below into your existing ~/Library/Application Support/Claude/claude_desktop_config.json (keep any other keys you already have, e.g. `preferences`). Replace the absolute paths. Use the ABSOLUTE uv path (GUI apps don't see your shell PATH): `which uv` → /opt/homebrew/bin/uv (Apple Silicon) or /usr/local/bin/uv (Intel). Fully QUIT and reopen Claude Desktop after editing. The `env` proxy block is OPTIONAL (see the Claude Code example).
